sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45916" key="e)/xhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔχησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n45916.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg004:417:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">417.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
